calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Apr-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Terese Raddie, Esq., for Nancy O. Wong, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers testimony as to the bank's position regarding title of the bank accounts. The court and counsel discuss whether a better approach to resolve this matter would have been to file a Sec. 850 petition instead. Upon conclusion of discussion, the court advises that it intends to take the matter under submission with the intent to make changes to the proposed order. The court offers counsel the option to submit a new proposed order or have the court make changes to the existing proposed order. Counsel chooses the latter and points the court to the sections in the proposed order that it believes the court proposes to make changes to.

The matter is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Wong. Not Reported.
